task_specific_assessments.error_explanation: This video contains educational content about tubal sterilization procedures, not an FLS (Fundamentals of Laparoscopic Surgery) skills assessment. FLS tasks involve hands-on manipulation of instruments within a laparoscopic trainer box to complete specific standardized tasks like peg transfer, pattern cutting, endoloop placement, or suturing.

score_components.formula_applied: Not applicable - this is not an FLS task video

confidence_rationale: Clear visual evidence throughout all frames shows this is educational content about medical procedures, not a hands-on FLS skills assessment. No laparoscopic trainer box, instruments, or standardized FLS tasks are visible.
technique_summary: Not applicable - this video shows educational content about tubal sterilization procedures rather than FLS task performance.
improvement_suggestions: For FLS assessment, would need video of actual hands-on task performance within a laparoscopic trainer
